meta.title: FAQ — Frequently Asked Questions | B2B Insight Panel
meta.description: Answers about your account, earnings, payouts, and privacy on InsightPanel — the B2B insight panel that pays real money for real opinions.

items.question: Is it really free to join?
items.answer: Yes — 100% free, forever. No sign-up fees, no subscriptions, and no withdrawal fees. You keep every cent you earn.

items.question: Do I need to verify my identity?
items.answer: A verified email is required to sign up. For payouts over $50 we may ask for basic verification to prevent fraud and protect your balance.

items.question: Can I use InsightPanel on multiple devices?
items.answer: Yes — your account and balance sync across web and mobile. One account per person, please; duplicate accounts get suspended.

items.question: How much can I earn?
items.answer: Most members earn between $30 and $150 a month doing surveys in their spare time. The more complete your profile, the more surveys you match.

items.question: How long do surveys take?
items.answer: Most take under five minutes. Every survey shows the exact reward and estimated time before you start.

items.question: What if I don't qualify for a survey?
items.answer: You'll usually know within the first few questions — we design it so you're screened out quickly and matched with better-fitting studies.

items.question: How do I get paid?
items.answer: Cash out to PayPal, bank transfer, or 100+ gift card options once you reach a $5 balance. Most payouts arrive within minutes.

items.question: Are there any withdrawal fees?
items.answer: None. Whatever balance you cash out is the amount you receive, in full.

items.question: Is my data safe?
items.answer: Absolutely. Your responses are anonymized and never sold to third parties. We use bank-grade encryption, are fully GDPR compliant, and you can delete your data anytime.

items.question: Who sees my survey answers?
items.answer: Only aggregated, anonymized results are shared with the research brands — never your name, email, or identifying details.

cta.title: Didn't find your answer?
cta.subtitle: Our support team replies within one business day.
